mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pet ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pet (name, type, breed, age, gender, color, weight, health_status, vaccination, description, image_urls, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{type}, #{breed}, #{age}, #{gender}, #{color}, #{weight}, #{healthStatus}, #{vaccination}, #{description}, #{imageUrls}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE pet SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE pet SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pet WHERE status = #{status}
